hero.title: Hire React.js developers
hero.description: Hire React.js developers skilled in creating high-speed, scalable, and responsive applications across industries. Code Curo teams work with React.js, Redux, ES6, JSX, Git, API integrations, performance optimization, and cross-browser compatibility.
bullets: Frontend Expertise: React.js, Redux, Redux Saga, Next.js, Vue.js
Backend Collaboration: Node.js, Django, FastAPI, NestJS, Express, REST APIs
Databases & Storage: SQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, caching tools, cloud storage
Tools & IDEs: Git, JIRA, Swagger, Postman, Figma, Visual Studio Code

onboarding.title: Easy onboarding process
onboarding.description: Hire dedicated React.js engineers and remote developers to deliver innovative, high-quality frontend solutions.

steps.title: Profile Selection & Interview
steps.text: Review React.js profiles, conduct structured interviews, and validate technical, culture, and communication fit.

steps.title: 2 Weeks Free POC
steps.text: Run one complete sprint for two weeks to assess code quality, delivery rhythm, ownership, and collaboration.

steps.title: Easy Onboard
steps.text: Onboard selected React.js developers into your workflow and scale the team as product needs grow.

why.title: About Code Curo
why.text: Code Curo is a global technology partner with skilled professionals supporting extended teams and customized software development for businesses across India, the UK, Sweden, the UAE, and the USA.

why.title: Payment Terms and Billing
why.text: We support monthly invoicing, transparent hour tracking, and practical payment terms so remote teams can work with clear commercial expectations.

why.title: 2-Week Proof of Concept
why.text: Selected React.js profiles can begin with a focused proof of concept, giving you a clear view of code quality, communication, and delivery before a long-term commitment.

why.title: Strong Communication
why.text: Our developers align with your sprint process, join daily stand-ups, and collaborate through Slack, Google Chat, Jira, Trello, and show-and-tell sessions.

why.title: Long-Term Engagement
why.text: Start with a focused frontend need, build trust through delivery, then scale into full product teams across frontend, backend, DevOps, AI/ML, mobile, and QA.

projects.title: Customer Portal
projects.description: Built a React.js customer portal with API-driven workflows, PostgreSQL-backed data, role-based access, service partner onboarding, and a responsive UI for operations teams.

projects.title: Contact Centre Solution
projects.description: Delivered an admin portal with real-time dashboards, reports, chat workflows, FAQ management, and reusable React components for a customer service platform.

projects.title: IoT HVAC Dashboard
projects.description: Created React interfaces for managing HVAC IoT devices, supporting device health views, alerts, performance metrics, and scalable cloud-connected workflows.

projects.title: Investment Platform
projects.description: Enhanced frontend modules, localized views, notification flows, CRM-connected screens, and user journeys for a digital investment platform.

projects.title: Subscription Analytics Console
projects.description: Designed and built a React analytics console with charts, cohort filters, billing views, and admin controls for subscription product teams.

projects.title: Composable Storefront
projects.description: Developed a React storefront with product discovery, cart flows, checkout integrations, inventory visibility, and reusable merchandising components.

projects.title: Patient Engagement Portal
projects.description: Built a secure React portal for appointments, documents, care-team communication, reminders, and responsive patient self-service workflows.

projects.title: Learning Dashboard
projects.description: Created a React learning dashboard with progress tracking, course cards, assessment views, instructor analytics, and mobile-friendly student experiences.

cta.title: Build your dream React.js team
cta.description: Choose React.js expertise for your project with flexible and cost-effective engagement plans.

case_studies.title: Order Management System
case_studies.description: Developed a unified Point of Sale platform integrating third-party channels, with hybrid mobile apps using React Native, customizable web applications, and seamless cloud-based restaurant management for efficient operations.

case_studies.title: Cryptocurrency Payments
case_studies.description: Delivered a robust Merchant Payment system and Affiliate Flow system, enhancing cryptocurrency buying, selling, secure transactions, and third-party integrations for the client's crypto platform using Blockchain technology.

case_studies.title: FinTech Platform
case_studies.description: Configured third-party tools, updated documentation, enhanced frontend, validated and localized views, rationalized features, resolved bugs, implemented Notification and NordNet Linking services, and integrated CRM tool with COB links.

case_studies.title: Smart Air Ventilation
case_studies.description: Developed a cross-platform mobile app with a new UI, integrating ventilation systems for improved air quality. Technologies used: C#, Kotlin, Swift, Flutter, GetX, and a clean architecture for efficient development.

testimonials.quote: Collaborative, flexible, and technically strong. We partnered with Code Curo to build a hosted, mobile-friendly web application tailored for both desktop and mobile browsers.
testimonials.name: Megha Manchanda

testimonials.quote: Code Curo understood our customers' needs and designed a solution that significantly improved the user experience. We saw a clear increase in platform adoption.
testimonials.name: Sahir Ahmed

testimonials.quote: Code Curo delivered the project on time and fully met our expectations. Their team maintained clear and consistent communication both in person and through virtual meetings.
testimonials.name: Yasmin Baba

testimonials.quote: Code Curo helped us build Auggit from the ground up, backend, frontend, and OCR integration for accounting automation. They delivered ahead of schedule and treated the project like their own.
testimonials.name: Govind Gagoria
